Class BoardScene

java.lang.Object
view.scene.GameScene
view.scene.BoardScene
public class BoardScene extends GameScene
Represents the main gameplay scene where the actual board, units, and HUD are displayed. It manages the visual rendering loop, handles user inputs (panning, zooming, clicking), and binds logic events from the GameManager to the visual UI components.

  • Field Summary

    Initializes the rendering loop, centers the camera on the board, and officially begins visual updates for the game scene.

  • Constructor Details

    • BoardScene

      public BoardScene(javafx.stage.Stage primaryStage, Runnable onGameEnd)
      Constructs the main game board scene, initializing all UI layers, HUD components, and binding them to the GameManager's state.
      Parameters:
      primaryStage - the primary JavaFX stage
      onGameEnd - a Runnable callback triggered when the game concludes (e.g., to return to the main menu)

  • Method Details

    • begin

      public void begin()
      Initializes the rendering loop, centers the camera on the board, and officially begins visual updates for the game scene.
      Specified by:
      begin in class GameScene
